assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings GET /api/account returns 401 without auth
assertionResults.title: returns 401 without auth

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings GET /api/account returns the authenticated user profile
assertionResults.title: returns the authenticated user profile

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/profile updates display_name and preferred_language
assertionResults.title: updates display_name and preferred_language

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/profile rejects an unsupported language code
assertionResults.title: rejects an unsupported language code

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/profile accepts locale-style codes (e.g. en-GB) and normalises to the base
assertionResults.title: accepts locale-style codes (e.g. en-GB) and normalises to the base

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/profile rejects locale-style codes whose base is unsupported (e.g. xx-YY)
assertionResults.title: rejects locale-style codes whose base is unsupported (e.g. xx-YY)

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/profile rejects an oversized display name
assertionResults.title: rejects an oversized display name

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/profile rejects empty payload
assertionResults.title: rejects empty payload

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/password changes the password when the current password is correct
assertionResults.title: changes the password when the current password is correct

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/password rejects with wrong currentPassword
assertionResults.title: rejects with wrong currentPassword

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/password rejects when newPassword and confirmPassword differ
assertionResults.title: rejects when newPassword and confirmPassword differ

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/password rejects a weak new password
assertionResults.title: rejects a weak new password

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/password invalidates the old session and writes an audit-log entry
assertionResults.title: invalidates the old session and writes an audit-log entry

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/email initiates a verification flow without changing the live email
assertionResults.title: initiates a verification flow without changing the live email

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/email rejects an email already in use by another account
assertionResults.title: rejects an email already in use by another account

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/email rejects when newEmail equals current email
assertionResults.title: rejects when newEmail equals current email

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/email finalises the change when /email/confirm is called with the right token
assertionResults.title: finalises the change when /email/confirm is called with the right token

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-30: Account settings PUT /api/account/email rejects /email/confirm with the wrong token
assertionResults.title: rejects /email/confirm with the wrong token

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset-request returns ok for a known email and persists a hashed token
assertionResults.title: returns ok for a known email and persists a hashed token

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset-request returns ok for an unknown email and does not persist any token (enumeration defence)
assertionResults.title: returns ok for an unknown email and does not persist any token (enumeration defence)

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset-request rejects requests with no email
assertionResults.title: rejects requests with no email

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset-request rejects requests with malformed email
assertionResults.title: rejects requests with malformed email

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset-request records an audit-log entry on a known-email request
assertionResults.title: records an audit-log entry on a known-email request

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset updates the password and marks the token used on success
assertionResults.title: updates the password and marks the token used on success

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset rejects a token that was already used
assertionResults.title: rejects a token that was already used

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset rejects an expired token
assertionResults.title: rejects an expired token

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset rejects an unknown / forged token
assertionResults.title: rejects an unknown / forged token

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset rejects a weak new password
assertionResults.title: rejects a weak new password

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset invalidates pre-reset session tokens against /api/account/*
assertionResults.title: invalidates pre-reset session tokens against /api/account/*

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset rejects requests missing token or password
assertionResults.title: rejects requests missing token or password

assertionResults.fullName: CRAN-29: Password reset POST /api/auth/password-reset marks email_verified=TRUE on successful reset (user proved inbox access)
assertionResults.title: marks email_verified=TRUE on successful reset (user proved inbox access)
